title: alansmia glandulifera
intro: Alansmia glandulifera, a species of epiphytic plant, belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It is commonly known as the 'Birdsnest fern'. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alansmia glandulifera include promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and supporting respiratory health, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or supplement.
